Bash(cd /c/Users/ellio/SENTINEL_CANONICAL && python -c "
# Test the full auth flow end-to-end against the actual DB
import os
os.environ['JWT_SECRET_KEY'] = 'sentinel-test-hardening-123456789abc'

from backend.database.connection import init_db, SessionLocal
from backend.database.models import User, Intake, Order
from backend.auth.auth import hash_password, verify_password, create_access_token, create_refresh_token, rotate_refresh_token
import uuid

init_db\(\)
db = SessionLocal\(\)

# Clean up
test_email = 'softlaunch_check@test.com'
existing = db.query\(User\).filter\(User.email == test_email\).first\(\)
if existing:
    db.query\(Order\).filter\(Order.user_id == existing.id\).delete\(\)
    db.delete\(existing\)
    db.commit\(\)

# 1. Register
user = User\(email=test_email, name='Test', hashed_password=hash_password\('pass12345'\)\)
db.add\(user\); db.commit\(\); db.refresh\(user\)
print\(f'register: OK \(id={user.id}\)'\)

# 2. Login
ok = verify_password\('pass12345', user.hashed_password\)
access = create_access_token\({'sub': str\(user.id\)}\)
refresh = create_refresh_token\(user.id, db\)
print\(f'login: OK  access_token_len={len\(access\)}  refresh_token={refresh[:12]}...'\)

# 3. Intake \(guest - no user_id since column missing\)
intake = Intake\(
    intake_id=str\(uuid.uuid4\(\)\),
    session_id='guest-xyz',
    has_pinescript=False,
    strategy_description='EMA cross',
    market='crypto',
    timeframe='4h',
    email=test_email,
\)
db.add\(intake\); db.commit\(\); db.refresh\(intake\)
print\(f'intake: OK  id={intake.intake_id[:8]}...'\)

# 4. Order
order = Order\(
    order_id=str\(uuid.uuid4\(\)\),
    user_id=user.id,
    intake_id=intake.intake_id,
    product='fix',
    price=297.0,
\)
db.add\(order\); db.commit\(\); db.refresh\(order\)
print\(f'order: OK  id={order.order_id[:8]}...'\)

# 5. Refresh token rotation
new_refresh, uid = rotate_refresh_token\(refresh, db\)
print\(f'refresh rotation: OK  user_id={uid}  new_token={new_refresh[:12]}...'\)

# 6. Logout \(revoke\)
from backend.auth.auth import revoke_refresh_token
revoked = revoke_refresh_token\(new_refresh, db\)
print\(f'logout/revoke: OK  revoked={revoked}'\)

db.close\(\)
print\(\)
print\('Full flow: PASSED'\)
" 2>)
